subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! God hath, from Us, rewarded thee with the most excellent of rewards, and hath provided thee with that which He hath ordained of the wondrous tokens of His remembrance in the Hereafter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی قد جزاک الله منا خیر الجزآء و رزقک ما قدر من بدایع ذکره فی الاخره
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
